name: Large CONSORT Flow Diagram — 30+ Nodes
input: Create a CONSORT flow diagram for a multi-arm clinical trial. Enrollment: 2,847 assessed for eligibility, 1,203 excluded (412 not meeting criteria, 298 declined, 189 lost contact, 304 other). 1,644 randomized. Allocation: Arm A (Drug X 10mg) n=548, Arm B (Drug X 20mg) n=548, Arm C (Placebo) n=548. Follow-up losses per arm: Arm A (23 adverse events, 15 withdrew consent, 8 lost), Arm B (31 adverse events, 12 withdrew, 11 lost), Arm C (9 adverse events, 18 withdrew, 14 lost). Analysis: Arm A 502 analyzed (46 excluded), Arm B 494 analyzed (54 excluded), Arm C 507 analyzed (41 excluded). Use TD direction. Include all numeric data in labels.
qualityCriteria: All 3 arms shown with sample sizes
Exclusion reasons itemized (not meeting criteria, declined, lost contact)
Follow-up losses per arm with reasons
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: CONSORT flow with 30+ nodes, 3 arms, full enrollment-allocation-followup-analysis cascade with all numbers.
